taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Backend Software Engineer
core_skills: Python, TypeScript, React, API design, Backend services
skill_match_scores: Python:1.0, TypeScript:1.0, React:1.0, API design:1.0, Backend services:1.0
must_have_quals: 3+ years of experience building and shipping production full-stack software, Strong proficiency in Python, TypeScript, and React, Experience designing, building, and maintaining APIs and scalable backend services, Strong product intuition and attention to detail in building user-facing experiences, A self-directed, ownership-driven approach—you prioritize outcomes over process, Excellent collaboration and communication skills across engineering, AI, and product teams, Availability to work on-site in Menlo Park at least three days per week
preferred_quals: Experience building AI-powered or automation-heavy products, Exposure to health-tech or clinical data systems (EHRs, payers, or pharmacy integrations), Startup or early-stage experience; a founder mindset and bias for impact, Familiarity with cloud infrastructure (GCP, AWS), orchestration, and DevOps tooling
core_responsibilities: Build and scale Python-based backend systems and APIs that power AI-driven automation in healthcare, Develop modern frontend experiences using React + TypeScript, enabling clinicians and operations teams to easily leverage AI insights, Integrate and orchestrate LLM services in production environments, optimizing for performance, reliability, and user experience, Collaborate with AI and product teams to refine workflows, gather user feedback, and translate insights into product improvements, Own critical technical decisions around architecture, scalability, and developer experience, Enhance observability, testing, and CI/CD pipelines to ensure rapid, confident iteration, Lead development of new AI-powered product features that simplify and accelerate clinical and operational workflows, Scale our full-stack architecture to support 100× transaction growth and real-time analytics, Shape the data and API layer that powers both internal analytics and external integrations, Mentor future engineers and help build a strong engineering culture of quality and velocity
job_summary: Develop Health is on a mission to use AI to radically accelerate access to life-saving medications. They are seeking a Senior Software Engineer to design and ship systems and interfaces for their AI-driven healthcare platform, collaborating with AI and Product teams to enhance workflows and user experiences.
